final:
module RefModule 
(
  input rst_n,
  input clk,

  output reg [2:0] q
);

    wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @(posedge clk or negedge rst_n or posedge dbg_halt) begin
    if (!rst_n) 
	begin
      q <= 3'b000;
    end 
	
	else 
	begin
      q <= {~q[0], q[2:1]};
    end
  end

endmodule
